ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：他当晚只会因自身能力中毒、醉酒、疯狂或获得错误信息。
firstNightReminder: Wake the Costermonger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Costermonger's SAFE reminder. Then, put the Costermonger to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Costermonger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Costermonger's SAFE reminder. Then, put the Costermonger to sleep.
